description: This map illustrates a generic rural landscape, showing various land cover types and features, with a legend provided on the right. The dominant land cover is Grassland, represented by a solid yellow fill. Arable land is shown with a light yellow or white fill, appearing in the top right. Key features are marked with specific symbols and lines: Farm buildings are depicted as solid black squares. Tree outlines are shown as white shapes on the yellow grassland. Roads are represented by solid yellow lines. Cattle tracks are shown as finer, branched yellow lines. Water troughs are indicated by small blue squares. Temporary streams are represented by textured yellow outlines. No scale bar, compass, or specific geographic location is provided.
